name: WGD_ohnolog_architecture
description: Architectural record for the whole-genome-duplication (WGD) ohnolog set in S. cerevisiae. ~100 Mya ancestor underwent allopolyploidisation (Marcet-Houben & Gabaldon 2015) or autopolyploidisation followed by ~90% gene loss. ~550 ohnolog pairs survive (Wapinski 2007, Byrne & Wolfe 2005). Ohnolog pairs span the full identity range: ribosomal-protein ohnologs are >97% identical and require PSVs in introns/UTRs; metabolic ohnologs (GAL, HXK, HXT, ADH) range 70-90% identity; ancient ohnologs are <70%. Track the SGD ohnolog table for the complete list.

architecture.internal_structure: pairs of paralogous genes on different chromosomes, derived from the ~100 Mya WGD; ~550 retained pairs
